organic-the-remittance-company-took-47-o.hook: The remittance company took $47 of my $200 send. Here's the app that took $0.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Hold up a receipt or screenshot showing a Western Union/wire fee breakdown — real dollar amount lost. Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record Speed Wallet: open app → enter $200 → recipient gets exactly $200 → transaction confirmed in under 5 seconds. Beat 3 (26-45s): Voiceover: 'Lightning Network means no middlemen, no SWIFT fees, no waiting 3 days.' Beat 4 (46-58s): CTA card — 'Send your first payment free. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film fee receipt in good light (natural window light). Screen-record wallet flow at 1x speed — no cuts so it feels real, not staged. Add trending lo-fi beat under voiceover. Caption: #remittance #OFW #bitcoin #zerofees #moneytransfer

organic-i-tried-bitcoin-for-the-first-ti.hook: I tried Bitcoin for the first time. It took 60 seconds and I didn't need to understand any of it.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Talking head — 'Everyone told me crypto was complicated. I finally just tried it.' Beat 2 (8-25s): Screen-record download → create wallet → receive first satoshis via QR code scan — zero jargon shown. Beat 3 (26-45s): Reaction face — 'That's literally it? No KYC wall, no 48-hour wait, no confusing seed phrase ceremony.' Beat 4 (46-58s): CTA: 'Download Speed, scan a QR, you're in. Link in bio.' Text overlay: 'No experience needed.'
payload.production_notes: Shoot talking-head segments portrait, ring-light or near window. Screen-record on a clean phone (hide notification bar). Keep subtitles on — 85% watch muted on Instagram. Use jump-cut editing to keep pace under 60s. Caption: #bitcoin #cryptoforbeginners #lightningnetwork #speedwallet

organic-uganda-received-2-5-billion-in-r.hook: Uganda received $2.5 BILLION in remittances last year. The senders lost $300M+ in fees. This ends now.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-10s): Text-on-screen stat card — '$2.5B sent to Uganda. $300M eaten by fees.' Voiceover delivers with urgency. Beat 2 (11-28s): Quick montage of fee screenshots from traditional services (publicly available / recreated). Voiceover: 'Banks, wire services, and apps all take their cut before your family sees a dollar.' Beat 3 (29-48s): Speed Wallet screen-record — send $100, recipient gets $100.00, confirmed in 4 seconds. Beat 4 (49-58s): End card: 'Speed Wallet. Zero fees. Instant. Lightning.' Link in bio.
payload.production_notes: Recreate stat card in CapCut with bold white text on dark background — mirrors viral infographic style from hook #15. Use a single voiceover track recorded on phone with lapel mic ($15). No face required — full text-on-screen + screen-record keeps production at $0. Caption: #remittance #diaspora #bitcoin #zerofees #africa #OFW

organic-pov-you-found-out-bitcoin-is-jus.hook: POV: You found out Bitcoin is just… a payment app on your phone.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Reaction-style — creator looks surprised at phone, holds it up to camera: 'Wait, this is all it is?' Beat 2 (9-28s): Screen-record Speed Wallet homescreen → tap Send → enter $5 → scan a QR → done. Overlay text: 'No wallet address strings. No gas fees. No waiting.' Beat 3 (29-45s): Talking head: 'I spent years thinking Bitcoin was for tech people. This app made me feel dumb for waiting.' Beat 4 (46-58s): CTA: 'Download Speed. Your first send is on us.' On-screen text: 'Takes 60 seconds.'
payload.production_notes: POV format performs 23% higher CTR on TikTok for fintech per category benchmarks. Film reaction shot first (genuine, unscripted). Screen-record separately then edit together in CapCut. Add captions via auto-caption tool. Trending audio: use a surprised/revelation sound trending this week. Caption: #POV #bitcoin #crypto #speedwallet #lightningnetwork #cryptoforbeginners

organic-bitcoin-withdrawal-in-3-seconds-.hook: Bitcoin withdrawal in 3 seconds. No pending. No hold. Watch.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Talking head to camera — 'Every other crypto casino made me wait 3 days to cash out. Speed does this.' Beat 2 (7-22s): Screen-record iGaming platform withdrawal flow → choose Lightning/Bitcoin → paste Speed Wallet address → confirm → Speed Wallet shows incoming balance in 3 seconds. Real-time, uncut. Beat 3 (23-42s): Reaction: 'Three. Seconds. That's it. Already in my wallet.' Show balance update on screen. Beat 4 (43-58s): CTA: 'Speed Wallet — instant crypto deposits and withdrawals. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: iGaming organic is underindexed (only 8 organic items tracked) — early-mover advantage here. Use a neutral gaming desk setup for credibility. Ensure withdrawal is from a geo-compliant platform for legal safety. Speed up waiting screen with 4x then cut to instant confirmation — contrast is the hook. Caption: #igaming #bitcoincasino #cryptowithdrawal #lightningnetwork #speedwallet. Post Thu or Fri — iGaming audience peaks end of week.

paid-your-family-got-153-you-sent-200-wh.hook: Your family got $153. You sent $200. Where did $47 go?
paid-your-family-got-153-you-sent-200-wh.estimate: $1.80–$2.60 (30–43% below $3.17 benchmark — high emotional relevance + specific loss framing drives lower CPM and higher CTR in remittance segment)

payload.problem: Cut to split-screen: left side shows sender sending $200, right side shows recipient receiving $153. Voiceover: 'Wire transfers, remittance apps, and banks all take fees — sometimes 20% or more. Your family pays the price every single time.'
payload.solution: Screen-record Speed Wallet: send $200 → recipient gets $200.00 → confirmed in under 5 seconds. Text overlay: 'Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Instant. Works in 50+ countries.' Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet uses the Bitcoin Lightning Network — no middlemen, no fees, no delays.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Send your first $0-fee transfer today.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): Latino 25-44, Filipino 25-44, Nigerian 25-44, interests: international money transfer, Western Union, Remitly, MoneyGram, 'sending money home'. Lookalike: 1% LAL from Speed app installs.

payload.problem: Talking head UGC-style: 'I always thought Bitcoin was for tech bros and day traders. Too complicated. Too risky. I didn't even know where to start.' Quick cuts of confusing exchange UI, long KYC forms, seed phrase screens — things that represent the barrier.
payload.solution: Screen-record Speed Wallet onboarding: download → open → receive Bitcoin via QR in under 60 seconds. Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet skips all of that. No complicated setup. No 48-hour verification. Just scan, send, done — powered by Bitcoin Lightning.' Text overlay: 'Simplest Bitcoin app, period.'

payload.audience: TikTok: 18-34, interests: personal finance, investing, financial literacy, Robinhood, Cash App, crypto-curious behavior signals. Exclude: existing crypto power users (interest: DeFi, NFT, Web3 development).

paid-3-second-bitcoin-withdrawal-no-pend.hook: 3-second Bitcoin withdrawal. No pending. No hold. Proof.
paid-3-second-bitcoin-withdrawal-no-pend.estimate: $2.20–$2.90 (below benchmark — iGaming audience has high purchase intent and low creative saturation in Lightning payments; proof-based 'no-cut' screen-record format reduces skepticism and boosts CVR)

Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning — the fastest payment network on earth. Instant deposits. Instant withdrawals. Always.' Text overlay: '$0 fees. 3-second confirmation.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Play faster, cash out faster.
payload.audience: Meta + TikTok: Men 21-45, interests: online casinos, sports betting, crypto gambling, DraftKings, FanDuel, Stake, Bitcoin. Geo: US states where online gaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, CO, NV, WV, IL). Retarget: Speed website visitors who did not install.
